summary: Regression verification after key-prop cleanup (chat msg keys → stable UUID; storefront risk-matrix chips → key by r.flag). Login, NEXUS AI chat (2 msgs), Intel Marketplace/Storefront, Overview, and Governance all functional with ZERO React unique-key warnings in console.
test_credentials: admin@nexus.io / nexus123 (works via POST /api/auth/login, httpOnly cookie)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login via page.request.post to /api/auth/login sets cookie for playwright context, then goto /dashboard works reliably. Chat: 2 messages returned chat-msg-0 (user 'Hello') and chat-msg-1 (NEXUS reply). Storefront rendered 139 card-like elems, 60 risk chips, Florida leads visible. Overview + Governance tabs load OK. Console showed 0 React key warnings; 2 unrelated 401s occurred before login cookie was set (harmless).
